title: Introduction to Neuroscience (Focus 1)

further_info: Recommended Reading Bear, Connors, Paradiso (2015) Neuroscience - Exploring the Brain (*) Kandel, Schwartz, Jessel (2013) Principles of Neural Science Purves, Augustine, Fitzpatrick (2012) Neuroscience Nicholls, Martin, Fuchs (2012) From Neuron to Brain Karnath, Thier (2012) Kognitive Neurowissenschaften Current reviews (*): around 10 copies of this book are available at the office of Victor Winter (winter@uni-heidelberg.de) for the duration of the course.
